Flow.description: Added business specific email templates. 29/04/25 Removed the Hard coded Branch logic and added the Sub Flow to make the logic dynamic. 11/6/25
Flow.label: 1218 3B Certificate Approval

fields.name: Competency_Not_Found2
fields.fieldText: Competency Record has not been found with the given Certificate Name. Ticket will not be created

fields.name: Error_Message
fields.fieldText:
Error: {!$Flow.FaultMessage}

Error at: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}.

Flow: 1218 3B Certificate Approval

fields.name: Error_Message_validity
fields.fieldText: Please populate the Valid Start Date and End Date in the 'Validity' section and refresh your browser before you can verify the Certificate.

fields.name: Returned_Rejected2
fields.fieldText:
Last Update regarding the current

Information


Rejected by:

{!Get_Certificate_Record.Rejected_By__r.FirstName} {!Get_Certificate_Record.Rejected_By__r.LastName}

﻿On: {!Get_Certificate_Record.Rejected_date__c}

With the following Reason: {!Get_Certificate_Record.Rejection_Reason__c}

fields.name: Approved
fields.fieldText:
Last Update regarding the current

Information


Verified by:{!Get_Certificate_Record.Verified_By__r.Name}

﻿On: {!Get_Certificate_Record.Verified_Date__c}

fields.name: certificateApproval
fields.fieldText:
Certificate Approval

Please use the buttons below to either Approve or Reject the document that the candidate has provided.

fields.name: CertificateApproved
fields.fieldText:
Last Update regarding the current

Information


Verified by: {!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName}

﻿On: {!CurrentDate}

subflows.name: X1218_Sub_Flow_to_Get_the_Email_Template
subflows.label: 1218 - Sub Flow to Get the Email Template
